dependencies.name: python
dependencies.reason: The repository contract validator uses Python standard-library TOML, JSON, XML, and path support.

dependencies.name: cmake
dependencies.reason: The implemented scaffold declares CMake 3.24, while 4.3.3-r1 is the observed reference version; 3.24 has not been verified as the oldest supported version.

dependencies.name: ninja
dependencies.fallback: CMake may use another explicitly selected supported generator.
dependencies.reason: Ninja is the observed generator in the Gentoo reference environment, not a universal runtime dependency.

dependencies.name: pkgconf
dependencies.reason: The reference environment provides pkg-config-compatible discovery for system libraries.

dependencies.name: gcc
dependencies.fallback: Clang is the separately required second compiler family under ADR 0008.
dependencies.reason: GCC is the observed system compiler; a supported minimum remains unmeasured.

dependencies.name: clang
dependencies.fallback: GCC is the reference system compiler and the separately required compiler family under ADR 0008.
dependencies.reason: Clang is installed for the accepted two-compiler build matrix; a supported minimum remains unmeasured.

dependencies.name: googletest
dependencies.fallback: Test-disabled builds must configure without GoogleTest.
dependencies.reason: The implemented foundation tests use the system-packaged GoogleTest 1.17.0 through CTest without linking it into runtime code.

unresolved.reason: The CMake 3.24 declared constraint and minimum supported compiler, generator, and test-framework versions require lower-bound build evidence.
